'''Bovit Leebo''' was a famed [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Holographer/Legends|holographer]]. Leebo captured the famous image of [[Ka'Pa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] which would later be featured in ''[[Riccix's Revised Basic Holodictionary]]''. The image fell into public domain after the Rodian holographer was killed by Ka'Pa's agent.
